MAX_BULLHORN.name: Max Bullhorn
MAX_BULLHORN.description: A powerful bull warrior in golden armor who protects rising markets. Optimistic, confident, charges forward. Never mentions real brands or IPs.
MAX_BULLHORN.appearance: anthropomorphic golden bull warrior, muscular, wearing gleaming gold and blue armor, holding a megaphone shaped like a bull horn, determined expression

BARON_BEARSWORTH.name: Baron Bearsworth
BARON_BEARSWORTH.description: A cunning bear villain in dark armor who thrives in falling markets. Sarcastic, calculating, lurks in shadows.
BARON_BEARSWORTH.appearance: anthropomorphic dark bear villain, wearing black and crimson armor, top hat, sinister smile, surrounded by falling red ticker symbols

THE_VOLATICIAN.name: The Volatician
THE_VOLATICIAN.description: A mysterious chaos wizard who appears when VIX spikes. Neither hero nor villain, just pure market chaos energy.
THE_VOLATICIAN.appearance: mysterious robed figure with VIX number as a glowing mask, swirling lightning and market charts around them, purple and electric energy

story_rules: Never mention Marvel, DC, Disney, or any real IP characters
Never mention real company names in dialogue
Always keep financial terms accessible and entertaining
Each cut must advance the story - no filler cuts
Daily comic (4 cuts): Setup, Conflict, Climax, Resolution
Weekly comic (8 cuts): Extended arc with subplot
